title: Yoga-based layout computation for scene graph nodes
purpose: Computes and applies layout information to scene graph nodes using the Yoga layout engine, supporting both automatic and fixed sizing modes.
module_context: Exports functions for computing layouts on scene graph nodes using Yoga, including bottom-up traversal and tree building logic.

steps.content: Retrieve the frame node from the scene graph.
IF the frame does not exist or has no layout mode, return early.
Build a Yoga tree representation of the frame and its children.
Calculate the layout using Yoga's layout engine with left-to-right direction.
Apply the calculated Yoga layout back to the scene graph nodes.
Free the allocated Yoga tree memory.
Initialize a set to track visited nodes during traversal.
Perform a bottom-up layout computation starting from the root node.

methods.name: computeLayoutsBottomUp
methods.normalized_params: (graph: SceneGraph, nodeId: string, visited: Set<string>): void

steps.content: Retrieve the node from the scene graph.
IF the node does not exist or has already been visited, return early.
Mark the node as visited.
Recursively compute layouts for all child nodes.
IF the node has a layout mode other than NONE, compute its layout.
Create a new Yoga node to represent the root of the tree.
Set fixed width or height based on primary axis sizing.
Set fixed height or width based on counter axis sizing.
Configure flex direction based on layout mode.
Set flex wrap behavior based on layout wrap setting.
Set primary axis alignment and counter axis alignment.
Apply padding values to the Yoga node.
Set gap values for both column and row directions.
Iterate through children and build Yoga nodes for each.
Skip children with absolute positioning.
Configure child nodes as auto layout or leaf nodes.
Insert the child Yoga node into the root node.
Return the constructed Yoga tree root node.

methods.name: configureChildAsAutoLayout
methods.normalized_params: (yogaChild: YogaNode, child: SceneNode, parent: SceneNode, graph: SceneGraph): void

steps.content: Determine if the parent and child are in row layout mode.
Set sizing properties for width and height based on layout orientation.
Set flex grow and shrink properties for the child node.
Configure flex direction for the child node.
Set flex wrap behavior for the child node.
Set primary axis alignment and counter axis alignment for the child.
Apply padding values to the child node.
Set gap values for both column and row directions for the child.
Iterate through grandchildren and build Yoga nodes for each.
Skip grandchildren with absolute positioning.
Configure grandchild nodes as auto layout or leaf nodes.
Insert the grandchild Yoga node into the child node.

methods.name: configureChildAsLeaf
methods.normalized_params: (yogaChild: YogaNode, child: SceneNode, parent: SceneNode): void

steps.content: Determine if the parent is in row layout mode.
IF the child has a layout grow value greater than zero, set flex grow and adjust height or width.
ELSE set fixed width or height based on layout mode and stretch behavior.
Set alignSelf to stretch if the child's alignment is set to stretch.

methods.name: setSizing
methods.normalized_params: (yogaNode: YogaNode, axis: 'width' | 'height', sizing: string, fixedValue: number, grow: number): void

steps.content: IF the grow value is greater than zero, set flex grow and shrink properties.
ELSE handle sizing based on the sizing mode.
IF sizing is FIXED, set the appropriate dimension.
IF sizing is HUG, do nothing.
IF sizing is FILL, set flex grow and shrink properties.

methods.name: applyYogaLayout
methods.normalized_params: (graph: SceneGraph, frame: SceneNode, yogaNode: YogaNode): void

steps.content: IF the frame's primary or counter axis sizing is HUG, update the frame's dimensions.
Iterate through the frame's children and apply computed layout properties.
Skip children with absolute positioning.
Update the child node with computed x, y, width, and height values.
IF the child has a layout mode other than NONE, recursively apply Yoga layout to it.
Recursively free all child nodes of the current node.
Free the memory allocated for the current node.
Map the alignment value to a Yoga Justify enum.
Return FlexStart as default for unrecognized alignments.
Map the alignment value to a Yoga Align enum.
Return FlexStart as default for unrecognized alignments.
